content.text: I have two configurations (A and B) and I need to merge them into a single dictionary structure, ensuring that reserved system fields are excluded.
What happens if a field exists in both self.m_blk_a and self.m_blk_b?
If a field name appears in both blocks, the value from `self.m_blk_b` will overwrite the value copied from `self.m_blk_a`, as the second loop iterates over B after A finishes.
Thanks, that makes sense how it handles conflicts.
